name: glomax
description: GloMax e-commerce with admin panel and Firebase Realtime Database

scripts.deploy: npm run prepare:functions && npm --prefix functions install && firebase deploy --project glomax-657d7 --only hosting,functions,firestore:rules
scripts.deploy:all: npm run prepare:functions && npm --prefix functions install && firebase deploy --project glomax-657d7 --only hosting,functions,firestore:rules,storage
